tasks.name: Build and push Docker image
tasks.description: Get Dockerfile building on P100 node. Use PyTorch+CUDA base image. Bake TrOCR-small and MiniLM weights into the image at build time.
validation: docker build completes without errors
docker image contains model weights (no download on startup)
Container starts successfully on P100 node

tasks.name: Smoke test both endpoints
tasks.description: Confirm /predict/htr accepts base64 image and returns transcription + confidence. Confirm /predict/search accepts query string and returns ranked results with scores. Confirm /health reports correct device.
validation: POST /predict/htr with base64 image returns {transcription, confidence}
POST /predict/search with query string returns ranked results with scores
GET /health returns correct device detection (CPU vs CUDA)
No import errors or shape mismatches

tasks.name: Baseline benchmark — CPU
tasks.description: Run container without GPU. Write benchmarking script that sweeps concurrency levels (1, 4, 8, 16). Record p50/p95 latency, throughput, error rate. Use synthetic image for HTR and representative query for search. 50-100+ requests per level.
validation: Benchmark script runs end-to-end with GPU disabled
Results collected for concurrency levels 1, 4, 8, 16
Each level has p50 latency, p95 latency, throughput (req/s), error rate
Both /predict/htr and /predict/search endpoints benchmarked

tasks.name: Baseline benchmark — GPU
tasks.description: Restart container with P100 exposed. Re-run same benchmark script at same concurrency levels. Expect meaningful latency drop on HTR, possibly smaller on search.
validation: Benchmark script runs end-to-end with P100 GPU
Results collected for concurrency levels 1, 4, 8, 16
Each level has p50 latency, p95 latency, throughput (req/s), error rate
Both endpoints benchmarked, results comparable to CPU run

tasks.name: Record results in serving options table
tasks.description: Fill in rows: baseline_pytorch_cpu and baseline_pytorch_gpu. Columns: option name, endpoint URL, model version (HF model ID + pretrained), code version (git SHA), hardware, p50/p95 latency per endpoint, throughput, error rate, concurrency tested, compute instance type, resource utilization notes.
validation: Table has baseline_pytorch_cpu row with all columns filled
Table has baseline_pytorch_gpu row with all columns filled
Resource utilization observations from htop/nvtop included

tasks.name: Commit and push
tasks.description: Commit app code, Dockerfile, compose file, and benchmark script. Push to unblock teammates for review.
validation: All serving files committed (app, Dockerfile, compose, benchmark script)
Pushed to remote serving branch

tasks.name: ONNX export (stretch)
tasks.description: Export both models to ONNX. MiniLM via torch.onnx.export, TrOCR via optimum ORTModelForVision2Seq. Verify exported models load in ORT session with correct output shapes.
validation: MiniLM exported to .onnx, loads in onnxruntime.InferenceSession
TrOCR exported to .onnx via optimum, loads in ORT session
Both models produce correct output shapes on sample input
